title: Advancement-Based Spawning
description: Control mob spawning easily with advancements via datapack!
body:
![Advancement-Based Spawning](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/905019/description_57c563b5-114c-46bc-8dd7-64de645b0e39.png)
# Advancement-Based Spawning

Is a small mod that allows you to control mob spawning via datapack. With it, you can easily control mob spawns dependant on what Advancements have or haven't been unlocked!

For a comprehensive explanation of how to use ABS, [check out our GitHub ReadMe!](https://github.com/infernalstudios/ABS#readme)

Enjoy! :D
